steps.title: Identify the middle terms
steps.content: In the product $(4x-21)(17x+5)$, the coefficient $b$ comes from the two terms that produce $x$-terms.

steps.title: Combine the x-terms
steps.content:
Multiply and combine the middle terms:
$$4x\cdot5+(-21)(17x)=20x-357x=-337x$$
So the coefficient of $x$ is $-337$. The answer is -337.
